package rulecoverage

func NegativeClientInputErrorMappedToInternalServerError() string {
    ruleID := "client_input_error_mapped_to_internal_server_error"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Request parsing or binding errors that are translated into `500` responses instead of client-error status codes."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
